title: paeonia × suffruticosa f. papaveracea
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa f. papaveracea, a cultivar of the peony plant, is a cross between Paeonia suffruticosa and Paeonia lactiflora. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of glycosides, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa f. papaveracea include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions.
